description: Investigate and fix all failing CI checks and E2E tests. Run the full verification suite (npm run check and npm run test:e2e), identify all failures, and fix them.

userStories.title: Fix all failing CI checks and E2E tests
userStories.description: Run the full check suite (build, type-check, lint, knip, unit tests, E2E tests), identify all failures, and fix them. This is a maintenance sweep to ensure CI is green.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run test exits 0 with all unit tests passing
npm run test:e2e exits 0 with all E2E tests passing
userStories.notes:
Files:
- Unknown until failures are identified — the agent must run the checks and fix whatever is broken

Context:
This is an open-ended maintenance task. The agent should:
1. Run `npm run build` — fix any build errors
2. Run `npm run type-check` — fix any type errors
3. Run `npm run lint` — fix any lint violations
4. Run `npm run knip` — fix any unused code warnings
5. Run `npm run test` — fix any failing unit tests
6. Run `npm run test:e2e` — fix any failing E2E tests

As of the last check, build/type-check/lint/knip/unit tests all pass. E2E tests are still running and may have failures.

Constraints:
- Do NOT skip or disable tests to make them pass — fix the underlying issue
- Do NOT add biome-ignore comments
- If an E2E test is flaky (passes sometimes, fails sometimes), investigate the root cause rather than adding retries
- If a test failure is caused by a genuine bug in production code, fix the production code
- If no tests are failing, report that CI is green and mark the story as complete with no changes
